name: Do I need a lawyer to fight if my LA firm's Google AI use got our work product discovered?
description: Yes, get e-discovery lawyer; pro se too risky in privilege fights.[4]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer to fight if my LA firm's Google AI use got our work product discovered?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, get e-discovery lawyer; pro se too risky in privilege fights.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, hire a litigation attorney experienced in e-discovery and privilege disputes, as self-representation risks further waivers like in Heppner where AI outputs were ruled discoverable.[3][4] Factors: complexity of motions to quash, opposing arguments on waiver. Pro se harder in federal court. Costs may be recoverable if you prevail. Start with consult to evaluate motion chances.
